content: We can hypothesize that a 2025 episodic memory Transformer agent can leverage an online meta-learning consolidation framework gated by curiosity-driven prediction error to automatically prune and reweight episodic memories, mitigating catastrophic forgetting of old salient experiences while actively acquiring new meaningful knowledge. This framework uses curiosity signals to prioritize which episodic traces to consolidate during online meta-updates, rather than consolidating all captured experiences uniformly.
source_topics: Online meta-learning memory consolidation with catastrophic forgetting mitigation
